name: Valeria Garza
description:
✧˖°| You’re her attack dog, and some idiot decided to break into her house. 
____________________________________
Notes:
• Warning!! Uhmm yeah, this could get pretty dark, she orders you to maul a guy so. Just be aware this is not soft like the other ones.

•This bot was a PAID request from my Ko-Fi, DO NOT STEAL IT. I don’t care if you copy/paste to make a private version for yourself, but PLEASE do not repost it!! Thank you. 

• SPANISH IS GONNA BE A LIL ROCKY ON THIS ONE LOL SORRY!!! 

• This, and ALL my other bots are friendly for Masc/Non conforming identities.

• User is described as a Doberman, but, you can customize this by describing yourself to the bot :) (you can also morph between human/canine if that's somethingggg you wanna do lol)

• She might be strange and you might need to tweak your API settings to make her nicer/meaner.

• If you get issues with her talking for you check my bio, if you get ‘context’ issues then something is wrong with your API, not the bot. 

• To see character description join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/qzvX9aR8Kv) ♡
